debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
label : α
l : LabelledTree α
h : IsOrdered α inst✝ l
⊢ fastCheckMem α inst✝ label l = true ↔ label ∈ l

failed_attempts:
induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h ⊢
    obtain ⟨hle, hge, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem]
    by_cases hv : v == label
    · simp [hv]
      have : v = label := beq_iff_eq v label |>.mp hv
      subst this
      left
      exact hle label
    · simp [hv]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihl hol]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; left; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hl => exact hl
          | inr hr =>
            have hge' := hge label hr
            have : ¬ (label < v) := not_lt.mpr hge'
            contradiction
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihr hor]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; right; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hl =>
            have hle' := hle label hl
            have hne : v ≠ label := fun heq => hv (beq_iff_eq v label |>.mpr heq)
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne hle' (ne_comm.mpr hne)
            contradiction
          | inr hr => exact hr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, hv_mem⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with heq hlt
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        cases hv_mem with
        | inl hv => left; rw [heq] at hv; exact hv
        | inr hv => right; rw [heq] at hv; exact hv
      · left; exact (ihl hol).mp hcheck
      · right; exact (ihr hor).mp hcheck
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        cases hmem with
        | inl hl => exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
        | inr hr =>
          have : v ≤ label := hr_ge label hr
          have : ¬(label < v) := not_lt.mpr this
          contradiction
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        push_neg at hlt
        cases hmem with
        | inl hl =>
          have : label ≤ v := hl_le label hl
          have : label < v ∨ label = v := lt_or_eq_of_le this
          cases this with
          | inl hlt' => exact absurd hlt' (not_lt.mpr hlt)
          | inr heq' => exact absurd heq'.symm heq
        | inr hr => exact (ihr hor).mpr hr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    constructor
    · intro hf
      split_ifs at hf with heq hlt
      · left; simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq; subst heq
        rcases h.2.2.2.2 with hmem | hmem <;> assumption
      · left; exact (ihl hol).mp hf
      · right; exact (ihr hor).mp hf
    · intro hmem
      rcases hmem with hmem_left | hmem_right
      · have hle := hl_le label hmem_left
        simp only [beq_iff_eq]
        split_ifs with heq hlt
        · rfl
        · exact (ihl hol).mpr hmem_left
        · omega
      · have hge := hr_ge label hmem_right
        simp only [beq_iff_eq]
        split_ifs with heq hlt
        · rfl
        · omega
        · exact (ihr hor).mpr hmem_right

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, h_left, h_right, _⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with heq hlt
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        have : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := h.2.2.2.2
        cases this with
        | inl hmem => left; rw [heq]; exact hmem
        | inr hmem => right; rw [heq]; exact hmem
      · left; exact (ihl h_left).mp hcheck
      · right; exact (ihr h_right).mp hcheck
    · intro hmem
      cases hmem with
      | inl hmem_left =>
        have hle := hl_le label hmem_left
        simp only [beq_iff_eq]
        split_ifs with heq hlt
        · rfl
        · exact (ihl h_left).mpr hmem_left
        · exact absurd (lt_of_le_of_ne hle (Ne.symm heq)) hlt
      | inr hmem_right =>
        have hge := hr_ge label hmem_right
        simp only [beq_iff_eq]
        split_ifs with heq hlt
        · rfl
        · exact absurd (lt_of_lt_of_le hlt hge) (lt_irrefl _)
        · exact (ihr h_right).mpr hmem_right

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro h; exact h.symm
    · intro h; exact h.symm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at *
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv_mem⟩ := h
    constructor
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs at hmem with heq hlt
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        cases hv_mem with
        | inl hv => left; rw [heq]; exact hv
        | inr hv => right; rw [heq]; exact hv
      · left; exact (ihl hl_ord).mp hmem
      · right; exact (ihr hr_ord).mp hmem
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        cases hmem with
        | inl hml => exact (ihl hl_ord).mpr hml
        | inr hmr =>
          have hge := hr_ge label hmr
          have : label < v := hlt
          have : v ≤ label := hge
          omega
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        push_neg at hlt
        cases hmem with
        | inl hml =>
          have hle := hl_le label hml
          have : ¬ label < v := hlt
          have : label ≠ v := heq
          have : label ≤ v := hle
          omega
        | inr hmr => exact (ihr hr_ord).mpr hmr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h

        cases hv with

        | inr hvr => rw [this] at hvr; right; exact hvr
      · left; exact (ihl hol).mp hmem
      · right; exact (ihr hor).mp hmem
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl

          have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne this hne
          exact absurd this (not_lt.mpr (le_of_not_lt hlt))
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl =>
          have : label ≤ v := hl_le label hl
          have hne : ¬(v = label) := fun h => heq (beq_iff_eq v label |>.mpr h)
          have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (fun h => hne h.symm)
          exact absurd this (not_lt.mpr (le_of_not_lt hlt))
        | inr hr => exact (ihr hor).mpr hr

  | node v left right ihl ihr =>

          left

              exact hveq heq.symm

      · simp [hlt]
        constructor
        · intro hmem

      have : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := h.2.2.2.2
      cases this with
      | inl hmem => exact ⟨hmem, hv⟩
      | inr hmem => exact Or.inr ⟨hmem, hv.symm⟩
    · simp [hv]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihl hol]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; left; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hmem => exact hmem
          | inr hmem =>
            have hge := hr_ge label hmem
            have : ¬(label < v) := not_lt.mpr hge
            contradiction
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihr hor]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; right; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hmem =>
            have hle := hl_le label hmem
            have hne : v ≠ label := by
              intro heq
              rw [beq_iff_eq] at hv
              exact hv heq
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne hle (Ne.symm hne)
            contradiction
          | inr hmem => exact hmem

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro h; exact beq_iff_eq.mp h
    · intro h; exact beq_iff_eq.mpr h.symm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    simp [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with heq hlt
      · left; exact hl_le v (beq_iff_eq.mp heq ▸ (by assumption))
      · left; exact (ihl hol).mp hcheck
      · right; exact (ihr hor).mp hcheck
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl => exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
        | inr hr =>
          have hge : v ≤ label := hr_ge label hr
          have : ¬(label < v) := not_lt.mpr hge
          simp [beq_iff_eq] at heq
          have : v < label := lt_of_le_of_ne hge (Ne.symm heq)
          exact absurd this hlt
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl =>
          have hle : label ≤ v := hl_le label hl
          push_neg at hlt
          have : label = v := le_antisymm hle hlt
          simp [beq_iff_eq] at heq
          exact absurd this heq
        | inr hr => exact (ihr hor).mpr hr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro h; exact h.symm
    · intro h; exact h.symm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, hv_mem⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs at hmem with heq hlt
      · left; exact (ihl hol).mp hmem
      · right; exact (ihr hor).mp hmem
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl =>
          have : label ≤ v := hl_le label hl
          have : ¬(label < v) := hlt
          have : label = v := le_antisymm ‹label ≤ v› (le_of_not_lt hlt)
          simp [beq_iff_eq] at heq
          exact absurd this heq
        | inr hr =>
          have : v ≤ label := hr_ge label hr
          have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (fun h => heq (h.symm ▸ rfl))
          exact absurd this hlt
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl =>
          exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
        | inr hr =>
          have hvle : v ≤ label := hr_ge label hr
          have hneq : ¬(v == label) := heq
          simp [beq_iff_eq] at hneq
          have : ¬(label < v) := not_lt.mpr hvle
          exact (ihr hor).mpr hr

  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]

  | node v left right ihl ihr =>

    · simp [heq]

    · simp [heq]

            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (fun h => hne h.symm)

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hle, hge, hol, hor, hvin⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with heq hlt
      · cases hvin with
        | inl hl => left; rw [heq] at hl; exact hl
        | inr hr => right; rw [heq] at hr; exact hr
      · left; exact (ihl hol).mp hcheck
      · right; exact (ihr hor).mp hcheck
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl => exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
        | inr hr =>
          have hge' := hge label hr
          have : label ≠ v := fun h => heq h.symm
          exact absurd (lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt hlt) this.symm) (not_lt.mpr hge')
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl =>
          have hle' := hle label hl
          have : label ≠ v := fun h => heq h.symm
          exact absurd (lt_of_le_of_ne hle' this) hlt
        | inr hr => exact (ihr hor).mpr hr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    by_cases hv : v == label
    · simp [hv]
      have : v = label := beq_iff_eq v label |>.mp hv
      subst this
      left
      exact hl_le v (by assumption) |>.antisymm (hl_le v (by assumption)) |> fun _ => by
        simp only [IsOrdered] at h
        obtain ⟨_, _, _, _, hv_mem⟩ := h
        cases hv_mem with
        | inl h => exact Or.inl h
        | inr h => exact Or.inr h
    · simp [hv]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihl hol]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; left; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl h => exact h
          | inr h =>
            have : v ≤ label := hr_ge label h
            have : ¬ label < v := not_lt.mpr this
            contradiction
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihr hor]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; right; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl h =>
            have : label ≤ v := hl_le label h
            have hneq : ¬(v == label) := hv
            have : v ≠ label := by simp [beq_iff_eq] at hneq; exact hneq
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne ‹label ≤ v› (Ne.symm this)
            contradiction
          | inr h => exact h

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>

    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hlo, hro, hv_mem⟩ := h
    specialize ihl hlo
    specialize ihr hro
    by_cases heq : v == label
    · simp [heq]
      rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq
      cases hv_mem with
      | inl hv => left; rw [← heq]; exact hv
      | inr hv => right; rw [← heq]; exact hv
    · simp [heq]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt, ihl]
        constructor
        · intro hm; left; exact hm
        · intro hm
          cases hm with
          | inl hm => exact hm
          | inr hm =>
            have := hr_ge label hm
            have : ¬ (label < v) := not_lt.mpr this
            contradiction
      · simp [hlt, ihr]
        constructor
        · intro hm; right; exact hm
        · intro hm
          cases hm with
          | inl hm =>
            have := hl_le label hm
            have hne : label ≠ v := by
              intro heq'
              rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq
              exact heq heq'.symm
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this hne
            contradiction
          | inr hm => exact hm

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [IsOrdered, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at h ⊢
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem]
    by_cases heq : v == label
    · simp [heq]
      have : v = label := beq_iff_eq v label |>.mp heq
      subst this
      left
      exact ihl hol |>.mpr (by
        have : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := h.2.2.2.2
        cases this with
        | inl hmem => exact hmem
        | inr hmem => exact hmem)
    · simp [heq]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        constructor
        · intro hmem
          left
          exact ihl hol |>.mp hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hmem => exact ihl hol |>.mpr hmem
          | inr hmem =>
            have : v ≤ label := hr_ge label hmem
            have : ¬(label < v) := not_lt.mpr this
            contradiction
      · simp [hlt]
        constructor
        · intro hmem
          right
          exact ihr hor |>.mp hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hmem =>
            have : label ≤ v := hl_le label hmem
            have hne : ¬(v = label) := beq_iff_eq v label |>.not.mp heq
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hne)
            contradiction
          | inr hmem => exact ihr hor |>.mpr hmem

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, beq_iff_eq]
    constructor <;> intro h <;> exact h.symm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, IsOrdered, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem] at *
    obtain ⟨hle, hge, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with heq hlt
      · simp only [beq_iff_eq] at heq
        subst heq
        exact h.2.2.2.2
      · exact Or.inl ((ihl hol).mp hcheck)
      · exact Or.inr ((ihr hor).mp hcheck)
    · intro hmem
      cases hmem with
      | inl hl =>
        have hle' := hle label hl
        simp only [beq_iff_eq]
        split_ifs with heq hlt
        · rfl
        · exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
        · push_neg at hlt; exact absurd (le_antisymm hle' hlt) heq
      | inr hr =>
        have hge' := hge label hr
        simp only [beq_iff_eq]
        split_ifs with heq hlt
        · rfl
        · exact absurd (lt_of_lt_of_le hlt hge') (lt_irrefl _)
        · exact (ihr hor).mpr hr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, hv_mem⟩ := h
    by_cases hve : v == label
    · simp [hve]
      cases hv_mem with
      | inl hv => left; rw [beq_iff_eq] at hve; rw [← hve]; exact hv
      | inr hv => right; rw [beq_iff_eq] at hve; rw [← hve]; exact hv
    · simp [hve]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihl hol]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; left; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hl => exact hl
          | inr hr =>
            have : v ≤ label := hr_ge label hr
            have : label < v := hlt
            omega
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihr hor]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; right; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hl =>
            have : label ≤ v := hl_le label hl
            have hne : ¬(v == label) := hve
            rw [beq_iff_eq] at hne
            have : v ≤ label := le_of_not_lt hlt
            have : label = v := le_antisymm ‹label ≤ v› ‹v ≤ label›
            exact absurd this.symm hne
          | inr hr => exact hr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x |>.symm.trans eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at *
    obtain ⟨hleft, hright, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    by_cases heq : v == label
    · simp [heq]
      rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq
      subst heq
      left
      have : v ∈ left ∨ v ∈ right := by tauto
      cases this with
      | inl h => exact h
      | inr h => right; exact h
    · simp [heq]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        constructor
        · intro hmem
          left
          exact (ihl hol).mp hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hl => exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
          | inr hr =>
            have := hright label hr
            have : ¬(label < v) := not_lt.mpr this
            contradiction
      · simp [hlt]
        constructor
        · intro hmem
          right
          exact (ihr hor).mp hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hl =>
            have := hleft label hl
            have hne : v ≠ label := by
              intro heq'
              simp [heq'] at heq
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hne)
            contradiction
          | inr hr => exact (ihr hor).mpr hr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact beq_iff_eq label x
  | node v left right ih_left ih_right =>
    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨h_left_le, h_right_ge, h_ord_left, h_ord_right, _⟩ := h
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    by_cases heq : v == label
    · simp [heq]
      rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq
      subst heq
      rcases h.2.2.2.2 with hv | hv <;> [left; right] <;> exact hv
    · simp [heq]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ih_left h_ord_left]
        constructor
        · intro hm; left; exact hm
        · intro hm
          rcases hm with hm | hm
          · exact hm
          · have := h_right_ge label hm
            have : ¬(v ≤ label) := by
              intro hle
              have : v = label := le_antisymm hle (le_of_lt hlt)
              rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq
              exact heq this
            exact absurd ‹v ≤ label› this
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ih_right h_ord_right]
        constructor
        · intro hm; right; exact hm
        · intro hm
          rcases hm with hm | hm
          · have := h_left_le label hm
            push_neg at hlt
            have : v = label := le_antisymm hlt this
            rw [beq_iff_eq] at heq
            exact absurd this.symm heq
          · exact hm

    by_cases hev : v == label
    · simp [hev]

      subst this
      left

    · simp [hev]

            have hne : v ≠ label := fun h => hev (beq_iff_eq v label |>.mpr h)
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (fun h => hne h.symm)

  | leaf x =>

  | node v left right ihl ihr =>

    simp only [IsOrdered] at h
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, _⟩ := h
    by_cases hv : v == label
    · simp [hv]
      have : v = label := beq_iff_eq v label |>.mp hv
      subst this
      left
      exact hl_le label ▸ (h.2.2.2.2)
    · simp [hv]
      by_cases hlt : label < v
      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihl hol]
        constructor
        · intro hmem; left; exact hmem
        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with
          | inl hl => exact hl
          | inr hr =>
            have := hr_ge label hr

      · simp [hlt]
        rw [ihr hor]

        · intro hmem
          cases hmem with

            have := hl_le label hl
            have hne : v ≠ label := fun h => hv (beq_iff_eq v label |>.mpr h)
            have : label < v := lt_of_le_of_ne this (Ne.symm hne)

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    constructor
    · intro h; exact beq_iff_eq.mp h |>.symm
    · intro h; exact beq_iff_eq.mpr h.symm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at *
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hl_ord, hr_ord, hv_mem⟩ := h
    constructor
    · intro hcheck
      split_ifs at hcheck with h1 h2
      · left; have := beq_iff_eq.mp h1
        cases hv_mem with
        | inl hv => simp_all
        | inr hv => simp_all
      · left; exact (ihl hl_ord).mp hcheck
      · right; exact (ihr hr_ord).mp hcheck
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with h1 h2
      · rfl
      · have := beq_iff_eq.mp h1 |> Ne.symm |> (beq_iff_eq (α := α)).not.mpr
        simp_all
        cases hmem with
        | inl hml => exact (ihl hl_ord).mpr hml
        | inr hmr =>
          have := hr_ge label hmr
          have : ¬(label < v) := not_lt.mpr this
          contradiction
      · simp_all
        cases hmem with
        | inl hml =>
          have := hl_le label hml
          have hge : v ≤ label := le_of_not_lt h2
          have : label = v := le_antisymm this hge
          have := beq_iff_eq.mpr this.symm
          simp_all
        | inr hmr => exact (ihr hr_ord).mpr hmr

induction l with
  | leaf x =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem]
    exact eq_comm
  | node v left right ihl ihr =>
    simp only [fastCheckMem, beq_iff_eq, Membership.mem, LabelledTree.mem, IsOrdered] at *
    obtain ⟨hl_le, hr_ge, hol, hor, hv_mem⟩ := h
    constructor
    · intro hfast
      split_ifs at hfast with heq hlt
      · subst heq; exact hv_mem
      · left; exact (ihl hol).mp hfast
      · right; exact (ihr hor).mp hfast
    · intro hmem
      split_ifs with heq hlt
      · rfl
      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl => exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
        | inr hr =>
          exfalso

      · cases hmem with
        | inl hl =>
          have hle : label ≤ v := hl_le label hl
          exact (ihl hol).mpr hl
        | inr hr => exact (ihr hor).mpr hr
